description: Displays an image from SF Symbols, asset catalog, resource bundle, file path, or URL

resourceName.description: Image file name in the resource bundle

filePath.description: Absolute file path to an image or PDF

resizable.description: Allow image to scale with frame; defaults to false

contentMode.description: Aspect-ratio scaling mode when resizable; defaults to 'fit'

imageScale.description: SF Symbol / Material Symbol rendering scale

materialName.description: (Android only; author as materialName:android) Material Symbol name, rendered as a variable-font glyph - the Android stand-in for systemName

materialWeight.description: (Android only) Material Symbols 'wght' axis, 100..700; defaults to 400

materialFill.description: (Android only) Material Symbols 'FILL' axis, 0..1 (or boolean); defaults to 0

materialGrade.description: (Android only) Material Symbols 'GRAD' axis, -50..200; defaults to 0

materialSize.description: (Android only) explicit glyph size in sp; defaults to the imageScale-scaled ambient font size
